rows.description: Jui. 1794 Bought Stock in 3 per Cent Consols
rows.notes: Taken from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly identified the marginal note as 'Jan. 1794' and separated it as a 'header' row, then misattributed amounts. Gemini-flash correctly integrates 'Jui. 1794' (marginal date for July) into the description of the first part of the braced entry, which has no individual amount.
rows.english_description: Purchase of 3% Consols stock in July 1794.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of 3% Consols stock in July 1794 (amount not stated in structured fields).

rows.notes: Taken from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini misread the amount for the braced section as '300' and the L-figure as 'L1205.5.4', then created an extra total row for the '300'. The image clearly shows '£800.0.0' for the braced group and 'L1205.5.1' for the description. This row completes the description for the braced entry, to which the £800.0.0 applies.
rows.english_description: Entry relating to the purchase/payment for Consols stock (reference L1205 5s 1d at price 66¼ with commission noted).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment relating to Consols stock purchase (referenced L1205 5s 1d at 66¼ and commission), recorded as £800 0s 0d.
